findings.title: Unvalidated user input in login handler
findings.summary: The login route passes user-supplied email directly to the query.
evidence: Line 42: db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = " + req.body.email)

findings.title: Missing rate limiting on password reset
findings.summary: The password reset endpoint has no rate limiting.
evidence: No rate-limit middleware applied in src/auth/reset.ts

work_blocks.rationale: Isolated security finding in the login handler.
Isolated security finding in password reset.
